'''vakocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dockboard|dockboard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dockboard|dockboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vakocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vækecheth|vækecheth]] || [[word:vækechej|vækechej]] || [[word:vækechesh|vækechesh]] || [[word:vækeche|vækeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vakokochoth|vakokochoth]] || [[word:vakokochoj|vakokochoj]] || [[word:vakokochosh|vakokochosh]] || [[word:vakokocho|vakokocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vakochoth|vakochoth]] || [[word:vakochoj|vakochoj]] || [[word:vakochosh|vakochosh]] || [[word:vakocho|vakocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vakofchoth|vakofchoth]] || [[word:vakofchoj|vakofchoj]] || [[word:vakofchosh|vakofchosh]] || [[word:vakofchof|vakofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vakochotho|vakochotho]] || [[word:vakochojo|vakochojo]] || [[word:vakochosho|vakochosho]] || [[word:vakochoko|vakochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vakochoth|vakochoth]] || [[word:vakochoj|vakochoj]] || [[word:vakochosh|vakochosh]] || [[word:vakocho|vakocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vakochothol|vakochothol]] || [[word:vakochojol|vakochojol]] || [[word:vakochoshol|vakochoshol]] || [[word:vakochokol|vakochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vakochothotho|vakochothotho]] || [[word:vakochojojo|vakochojojo]] || [[word:vakochoshosho|vakochoshosho]] || [[word:vakochoko|vakochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vakochothon|vakochothon]] || [[word:vakochojon|vakochojon]] || [[word:vakochoshon|vakochoshon]] || [[word:vakochokon|vakochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vakochothoro|vakochothoro]] || [[word:vakochojoro|vakochojoro]] || [[word:vakochoshoro|vakochoshoro]] || [[word:vakochokoro|vakochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
